sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15754" key="a)rtoptei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρτ-οπτεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n15754.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">place</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vessel for baking,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:112" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.112</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
